name: protocol number
value: OMNI-PAIN-103

name: clinical phase
value: Phase 1

name: study population
value: healthy men and women aged 19 to 55

name: study design
value: open-label randomized balanced single-dose four-treatment four-period four-sequence Williams-square crossover

name: treatments
value: 10 mg fasted; 20 mg fasted; 30 mg fasted; 30 mg fed

name: protocol dose days
value: Day 1; Day 4; Day 7; Day 10

name: screening window
value: Protocol <=30 days; ICF up to 31 days
adjudication: inclusive-boundary and participant-language difference; do not auto-select

name: study or confinement duration
value: Protocol/SAP 11 days; ICF about 12 days
source_locator: Protocol Synopsis; SAP Section 3; ICF p.3
adjudication: definition/counting difference; do not auto-label hard conflict

name: actual enrollment
adjudication: actual value; must remain distinct from F010 and F011

name: study objectives
value: dose proportionality; 30 mg food effect; safety and tolerability

name: key PK endpoints
value: M1 AUC0-inf; AUC0-t when appropriate; Cmax; T1/2; Tmax; Tlag

name: nominal PK blood sampling times
adjudication: change target for synthetic 32 h to 36 h test

name: fasting requirement
value: at least 10 h before dose and at least 4 h after dose

name: fed treatment meal
value: high-fat high-calorie meal started about 30 min before dose and consumed within 20 min

name: water restriction
value: Synopsis and SAP: no water 1 h before/after; Protocol body: only water allowed 1 h before/after
source_locator: Protocol Synopsis p.x versus Sections 3.1/5.1.3/6.2-6.5; SAP Section 3
adjudication: hard operational instruction conflict; block automatic confirmation

name: safety population
value: all participants receiving at least one dose

name: per-protocol population
value: meets eligibility; completes Day 11; receives all four doses; at least 13 of 15 PK samples per dose

name: evaluable population
value: calculable AUC0-inf or AUC0-t and/or Cmax; used for dose proportionality and food effect in Protocol
adjudication: map against SAP Safety/PP only after accounting for SAP safety-only scope

name: Protocol time axis
value: continuous study Day -1 through Day 11

name: CRF/SAP time axis
value: four periods; each dose represented as Day 1 within its period

name: interim analysis
value: no interim analysis

name: power statement
value: 24 participants; 20% intra-subject CV; 5% significance; about 89.6% power

name: participants analyzed by treatment
value: 10 mg fasted 24; 20 mg fasted 23; 30 mg fasted 23; 30 mg fed 23

name: study status
value: Completed
